---
title: Possibly Significant
image: logo.png
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 26em
  # links:
  #   - icon: bluesky
  #     text: Bluesky
  #     href: https://bsky.app/
  #   - icon: linkedin
  #     text: LinkedIn
  #     href: https://linkedin.com
  #   - icon: github
  #     text: Github
  #     href: https://github.com

code-tools: FALSE


format:
  html:
    author: {}
    citation: false
---

A statistics and data science blog to test out new ideas, share R tutorials, and collect my thoughts. Perhaps you will find something significant here.

[View blog posts](https://jarbet.github.io/possibly-significant/)
